title: Workshop: Build a Relief-Site Evidence Gallery
summary: Workshop: Build a Relief-Site Evidence Gallery retrieves prior skills in an original captioned service-location evidence gallery with content-driven wrapping scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply flex formatting context, flex sizing algorithm, flex alignment, flex wrapping, flex pattern selection in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real captioned service-location evidence gallery with content-driven wrapping artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Community Needs Survey one-dimensional layout work here. -->
starterFiles.css: /* Continue the resilient Flexbox patterns here. */
